title: NoChatValidation
description: A plugin which removes the failed to validate chat kick
body:
**Description:**

Tired of getting kicked with the frustrating "Chat Message Validation Failure" error message in your Minecraft server? Look no further! NoChatValidation is here to save the day.

NoChatValidation is a lightweight Bukkit plugin that prevents players from being kicked due to "Chat Message Validation Failure." This annoying kick message can be a nuisance, especially if you're just trying to enjoy your time on the server.

With NoChatValidation, you can:

- **Say goodbye to unnecessary kicks:** No more unexpected disconnections due to chat validation issues.

- **Enjoy a smoother gaming experience:** Focus on playing without interruptions caused by chat-related errors.


Installation is a breeze, and NoChatValidation works seamlessly with your existing Bukkit setup. Plus, it's designed to be developer-friendly, making it a valuable addition to your server's plugin arsenal.

Don't let "Chat Message Validation Failure" disrupt your Minecraft adventures any longer. Download NoChatValidation today and elevate your server's chat experience!
